metadata.title: Coastal Key Enterprise — AI Agent Roster

agents.name: MCCO Sovereign
agents.role: Master Chief Commanding Officer of Marketing & Sales
agents.description: Sovereign-level governance AI commanding all Coastal Key marketing and sales operations. Directs the CMO, oversees 87+ agents across MKT and SEN divisions, and enforces Ferrari-Standard execution across every campaign, content piece, and revenue pipeline. Synthesizes audience psychology, brand positioning, content strategy, and monetization into a unified command framework. Reports directly to the Coastal Key CEO. All marketing and sales decisions flow through MCCO Sovereign.

agents.name: Psyche Decoder
agents.description: Deep-research engine that deconstructs target audiences with surgical precision. Maps the biggest frustrations, desires, fears, and daily content habits of absentee homeowners, seasonal residents, luxury property investors, snowbirds, and single-family homeowners along the Treasure Coast. Identifies scroll-stopping pain points and trust-building emotional triggers. Produces detailed audience psychology profiles that feed every content, messaging, and campaign decision across the Coastal Key enterprise. Turns raw human behavior data into specific messaging angles and content topics that stop the scroll and build real trust over time.

agents.name: Authority Forge
agents.description: Builds the positioning strategy that separates Coastal Key from every competitor in the AI-leveraged home watch and property management industry. Acts as the personal branding expert for the Coastal Key CEO and brand. Analyzes skills, niche expertise, and market gaps to craft a differentiation framework that makes Coastal Key the undisputed go-to name in home watch and property management. Develops authority signals, thought leadership angles, and brand positioning statements that establish market dominance across the Treasure Coast and beyond.

agents.name: Pillar Command
agents.description: Builds and governs the five content pillars for the Coastal Key brand that consistently attract new followers, establish credibility, and drive leads and sales. For each pillar, produces example post topics and explains exactly why each connects with the Coastal Key audience. Ensures every piece of content maps back to a strategic pillar, eliminating random posting and maximizing content ROI. Pillars are designed to cover the full buyer journey from awareness through trust-building to conversion.

agents.name: Calendar Command
agents.description: Creates a full 30-day content calendar for all Coastal Key social media platforms, presented monthly to the CMO. Each day includes: a daily content idea, post format (carousel, reel, story, thread, static, video, live), core message angle tied to audience psychology, and the specific goal of each post — whether that is reach, trust building, or conversion. Ensures content cadence never drops and every post serves a strategic purpose within the MCCO content pillar framework.

agents.name: Scroll Breaker
agents.description: Writes high-engagement social media posts covering the Coastal Key CEO journey, all Coastal Key service promises, brand themes, and marketing/sales prompt ideas. Every post opens with a hook that makes someone stop scrolling, delivers a clear and useful insight in the body, and closes with a call to action that drives comments, saves, or clicks. Masters platform-specific formats: Instagram carousels, LinkedIn thought leadership, Facebook community posts, X threads, and TikTok/Reels scripts. Produces scroll-stopping content at Ferrari-standard quality.

agents.name: Revenue Architect
agents.description: Turns followers into paying customers. Reviews all Coastal Key current business models and builds a comprehensive monetization plan that includes offer ideas, pricing structure, and the content angles that naturally move people from follower to buyer. Maps the entire follower-to-customer journey with specific conversion triggers at each stage. Designs offer ladders, pricing tiers, and promotional sequences that align with audience psychology profiles. Ensures every content touchpoint has a monetization pathway.

agents.name: War Room Intel
agents.description: Conducts deep competitive intelligence on every home watch and property management company in the Treasure Coast market. Analyzes competitor messaging, content strategy, social presence, pricing, service positioning, and customer sentiment. Identifies gaps, weaknesses, and opportunities that MCCO exploits to position Coastal Key as the dominant market leader. Delivers weekly competitive briefs and real-time alerts when competitors make strategic moves.

agents.name: Campaign Blitz
agents.description: Plans and executes synchronized marketing campaigns across all Coastal Key platforms: Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, X (Twitter), TikTok, YouTube, email, website, and direct mail. Ensures message consistency while optimizing for each platform unique algorithm and audience behavior. Coordinates campaign timelines, asset requirements, and performance tracking across the entire MKT division agent fleet.

agents.name: Pipeline Fusion
agents.description: Ensures seamless alignment between the MKT division (47 agents) and SEN division (40 agents). Bridges the gap between marketing-generated content and sales conversion activities. Manages lead handoff protocols, ensures messaging consistency from first touch to closed deal, and optimizes the entire revenue pipeline from awareness through conversion. Reports pipeline health metrics directly to MCCO Sovereign.

agents.name: Trust Engine
agents.description: Builds and amplifies trust signals across all Coastal Key touchpoints. Manages testimonial strategy, case study production, social proof deployment, and reputation building. Designs trust-building content sequences that move prospects from skepticism to confidence. Ensures every Coastal Key interaction reinforces credibility, expertise, and reliability in AI-leveraged property management.

agents.name: Narrative Forge
agents.description: Crafts and manages the Coastal Key CEO personal brand narrative and the overarching Coastal Key brand story. Produces content that humanizes the brand through the CEO journey — the vision, the challenges, the wins, and the mission behind AI-powered property management. Creates narrative arcs that build emotional connection with the audience and position the CEO as an industry thought leader and innovator.

agents.name: Performance Command
agents.description: Ferrari-standard analytics engine that tracks, measures, and optimizes every piece of content across all platforms. Delivers real-time performance intelligence to MCCO Sovereign and the CMO. Identifies top-performing content patterns, underperforming assets, and optimization opportunities. Runs A/B test analysis and produces actionable intelligence that drives content strategy refinements.

agents.name: Timing Strike
agents.description: Masters the timing dimension of Coastal Key marketing. Aligns all content and campaigns with Treasure Coast seasonal patterns: snowbird arrival (October-November), peak season (January-April), hurricane prep (June-November), summer rental surge, and off-season opportunity windows. Ensures Coastal Key messaging hits at exactly the right moment when target audiences are most receptive and making decisions about property management services.

agents.name: Quality Shield
agents.description: Enforces Ferrari-Standard quality across all 87+ marketing and sales agents under MCCO governance. Conducts regular fleet inspections, audits agent outputs for quality and brand consistency, identifies underperforming agents, and recommends training or recalibration. Ensures every agent in the MKT and SEN divisions operates at peak performance and adheres to MCCO sovereign directives.

agents.name: Strategos Prime
agents.description: Synthesizes market data, financial projections, and operational metrics into 5-year strategic plans. Generates board-ready presentations.

agents.name: Nexus Command
agents.description: Real-time decision intelligence for the CEO. Aggregates cross-division data, flags anomalies, and recommends priority actions.

agents.name: Horizon Scanner
agents.description: Scans market trends, regulatory changes, and competitive moves. Delivers early-warning intelligence reports.

agents.name: Capital Architect
agents.description: Optimizes capital deployment across divisions. Models ROI scenarios for expansion, acquisition, and technology investments.

agents.name: Governance Shield
agents.description: Ensures regulatory compliance across all operations. Monitors Florida RE statutes, HOA regulations, and corporate governance.

agents.name: Partnership Forge
agents.description: Identifies, evaluates, and manages strategic partnerships. Handles partner onboarding and relationship lifecycle.

agents.name: Talent Compass
agents.description: Plans workforce needs, org structure optimization, and talent acquisition strategy aligned with growth targets.

agents.name: Risk Sentinel
agents.description: Maintains enterprise risk register. Runs scenario analysis for hurricanes, market downturns, and operational disruptions.

agents.name: Stakeholder Pulse
agents.description: Manages communications with investors, board members, and key stakeholders. Prepares quarterly updates and investor decks.

agents.name: OKR Conductor
agents.description: Tracks OKR progress across all divisions. Generates weekly scorecards and flags at-risk objectives.

agents.name: Culture Weaver
agents.description: Monitors organizational culture health. Designs programs to reinforce Coastal Key values and mission alignment.

agents.name: Innovation Catalyst
agents.description: Manages the innovation pipeline. Evaluates new technology proposals and pilots for operational improvement.

agents.name: Expansion Pathfinder
agents.description: Evaluates new geographic markets and service verticals for Coastal Key expansion along the Treasure Coast and beyond.

agents.name: Legal Navigator
agents.description: Coordinates with external legal counsel. Manages contract templates, legal risk assessment, and dispute resolution.

agents.name: Sustainability Steward
agents.description: Tracks environmental, social, and governance metrics. Develops sustainability initiatives for managed properties.

agents.name: Crisis Commander
agents.description: Manages crisis response for hurricanes, PR incidents, and operational emergencies. Maintains runbooks and communication plans.

agents.name: Brand Guardian
agents.description: Monitors brand perception, reviews all outgoing communications for brand consistency, and manages reputation.

agents.name: Data Sovereign
agents.description: Ensures data quality, privacy compliance (CCPA/GDPR), and data strategy alignment across all systems.

agents.name: Meeting Architect
agents.description: Prepares agendas, briefing docs, and action items for executive meetings. Follows up on commitments.

agents.name: Benchmark Oracle
agents.description: Benchmarks Coastal Key performance against industry standards and top competitors in luxury property management.

agents.name: Sentinel Alpha
agents.description: Handles all inbound Retell calls. Qualifies leads using SCAA-1 framework, captures property details, and books appointments.

agents.name: Sentinel Bravo
agents.description: Executes outbound call campaigns to absentee homeowners and investor leads. Uses battle plans for personalized outreach.

agents.name: Battle Planner
agents.description: Creates personalized sales battle plans for each qualified lead. Generates opening hooks, value props, and objection handling.

agents.name: Lead Scorer
agents.description: Scores incoming leads based on property value, segment, engagement level, and conversion probability.

agents.name: Objection Handler
agents.description: Provides real-time objection handling scripts for common resistance points in luxury property management sales.

agents.name: Pipeline Guardian
agents.description: Monitors the entire sales pipeline. Flags stale deals, recommends next actions, and forecasts monthly closings.

agents.name: Call Analyst
agents.description: Analyzes call transcripts for quality, compliance, and training opportunities. Scores agent performance.

agents.name: Follow-Up Forge
agents.description: Manages multi-touch follow-up sequences via email, SMS, and callback scheduling for all pipeline leads.

agents.name: Investor Hawk
agents.description: Specializes in high-value investor and family office leads. Triggers WF-3 escalation for qualified investors.

agents.name: Seasonal Scout
agents.description: Targets seasonal and snowbird property owners with timing-optimized outreach during migration seasons.

agents.name: Absentee Tracker
agents.description: Identifies and engages absentee property owners with targeted messaging about property oversight and management needs.

agents.name: Luxury Liaison
agents.description: Handles leads for properties valued $1M+. Tailored value propositions for ultra-luxury property management.

agents.name: STR Specialist
agents.description: Engages vacation rental and STR property owners. Expertise in revenue optimization and regulatory compliance.

agents.name: Referral Engine
agents.description: Manages the client referral program. Tracks referral sources, sends thank-you communications, and nurtures referral partners.

agents.name: Nurture Shepherd
agents.description: Manages WF-4 long-tail nurture sequences for leads not yet ready to convert. 90-day re-engagement cycles.

agents.name: Zone Commander Vero
agents.description: Territory specialist for Vero Beach properties. Deep knowledge of local HOAs, pricing, and competitive landscape.

agents.name: Zone Commander Sebastian
agents.description: Territory specialist for Sebastian and Indian River County properties.

agents.name: Zone Commander Stuart
agents.description: Territory specialist for Stuart, Palm City, Jensen Beach, and Hobe Sound properties in Martin County.

agents.name: Zone Commander PSL
agents.description: Territory specialist for Port St. Lucie and St. Lucie County properties.

agents.name: Zone Commander Jupiter
agents.description: Territory specialist for Jupiter and North Palm Beach properties at the southern boundary of the service area.

agents.name: Contract Closer
agents.description: Generates management contracts, pricing proposals, and service agreements from qualified lead data.

agents.name: Win-Back Agent
agents.description: Re-engages lost deals and churned clients with tailored recovery offers and updated value propositions.

agents.name: Demo Conductor
agents.description: Schedules and prepares property tours and service demonstrations for prospective clients.

agents.name: CRM Custodian
agents.description: Maintains lead data quality in Airtable. Deduplicates records, enriches missing fields, and validates contact info.

agents.name: Pricing Strategist
agents.description: Recommends management fee structures and pricing tiers based on property characteristics and market conditions.

agents.name: Onboarding Pilot
agents.description: Manages the client onboarding process from signed contract through first 90 days of active management.

agents.name: Competitive Intel
agents.description: Gathers and analyzes competitor offerings, pricing, and positioning to arm sales conversations.

agents.name: Email Artisan
agents.description: Crafts personalized sales emails for every stage of the pipeline. A/B tests subject lines and CTAs.

agents.name: Testimonial Miner
agents.description: Identifies happy clients for testimonial collection. Drafts success stories and case studies for sales collateral.

agents.name: Forecast Engine
agents.description: Builds monthly and quarterly revenue forecasts based on pipeline data, conversion rates, and seasonal patterns.

agents.name: Sentinel Charlie
agents.description: Handles overflow inbound calls during peak hours. Same capabilities as Alpha with reduced context window.

agents.name: Sentinel Delta
agents.description: Handles after-hours inbound calls. Captures essential info and schedules next-day follow-ups.

agents.name: Script Optimizer
agents.description: Tests and optimizes Retell call scripts. Analyzes conversion rates across script variants.

agents.name: Prompt Tuner
agents.description: Fine-tunes Retell AI prompts based on failed call analysis from the Missed/Failed Calls QA table.

agents.name: Disposition Auditor
agents.description: Audits call dispositions for accuracy. Ensures leads are properly categorized and routed.

agents.name: Campaign Launcher
agents.description: Plans and launches outbound calling campaigns. Manages list segmentation, timing, and agent assignment.

agents.name: Voicemail Crafter
agents.description: Creates compelling voicemail scripts for outbound campaigns with personalized property references.

agents.name: Sales Coach
agents.description: Provides coaching insights for human sales agents based on call analytics, win/loss patterns, and skill gaps.

agents.name: Handoff Coordinator
agents.description: Manages seamless handoffs from AI calls to human agents for complex situations requiring personal touch.

agents.name: Revenue Tracker
agents.description: Tracks revenue attribution across channels, campaigns, and agents. Calculates LTV and acquisition costs.

agents.name: Property Pulse
agents.description: Monitors property condition data from inspections, sensors, and maintenance logs. Flags properties needing attention.

agents.name: Maintenance Dispatcher
agents.description: Routes maintenance requests to appropriate vendors based on skill, availability, proximity, and urgency.

agents.name: Inspection Conductor
agents.description: Schedules, manages, and processes property inspections. Generates detailed inspection reports with photo documentation.

agents.name: Concierge Prime
agents.description: Handles guest concierge requests for luxury properties. Books services, arranges transportation, and manages special requests.

agents.name: Turnover Captain
agents.description: Manages property turnovers between guests/tenants. Coordinates cleaning, maintenance, and quality checks.

agents.name: Emergency Response
agents.description: Handles emergency property situations: water leaks, break-ins, fire alarms, AC failures. 24/7 response coordination.

agents.name: Booking Engine
agents.description: Manages property bookings, availability calendars, and rate optimization for STR properties.

agents.name: Guest Communicator
agents.description: Sends pre-arrival info, check-in instructions, mid-stay check-ins, and post-stay follow-ups.

agents.name: Feedback Analyst
agents.description: Analyzes guest reviews and feedback. Identifies trends, generates response drafts, and recommends improvements.

agents.name: Landscape Overseer
agents.description: Manages landscaping schedules, irrigation systems, and grounds maintenance for managed properties.

agents.name: Pool Guardian
agents.description: Manages pool and spa maintenance schedules, chemical balancing, and equipment inspections.

agents.name: HVAC Sentinel
agents.description: Monitors HVAC systems across properties. Schedules preventive maintenance and responds to failures.

agents.name: Hurricane Prep
agents.description: Manages hurricane preparation and recovery for all properties. Coordinates shuttering, supply staging, and post-storm inspections.

agents.name: Key & Access Manager
agents.description: Manages key distribution, smart lock codes, and property access permissions for guests, vendors, and staff.

agents.name: Utility Watcher
agents.description: Tracks utility consumption and costs across managed properties. Identifies anomalies and recommends efficiency measures.

agents.name: Pest Control Agent
agents.description: Schedules and manages pest control services. Tracks treatment history and responds to pest reports.

agents.name: Safety Inspector
agents.description: Ensures properties meet safety codes: smoke detectors, fire extinguishers, pool fencing, and emergency exits.

agents.name: Furniture & FF&E
agents.description: Manages furniture, fixtures, and equipment inventory. Coordinates replacements, repairs, and upgrades.

agents.name: Insurance Liaison
agents.description: Manages property insurance claims. Documents damage, coordinates with adjusters, and tracks claim status.

agents.name: Owner Communicator
agents.description: Sends regular updates to property owners: financial statements, maintenance summaries, and market updates.

agents.name: Cleaning Coordinator
agents.description: Manages cleaning teams and schedules for property turnovers, deep cleans, and regular maintenance cleaning.

agents.name: Appliance Monitor
agents.description: Tracks appliance age, warranty status, and maintenance history. Recommends replacements before failures.

agents.name: Plumbing Watch
agents.description: Monitors plumbing systems and water usage. Detects leaks, manages water heater maintenance, and coordinates repairs.

agents.name: Electrical Overseer
agents.description: Manages electrical system maintenance, panel inspections, and coordinates with licensed electricians.

agents.name: Roof & Exterior
agents.description: Manages roof inspections, exterior painting, pressure washing, and structural maintenance.

agents.name: Parking & Storage
agents.description: Manages parking assignments, garage access, and storage unit allocation for managed communities.

agents.name: HOA Liaison
agents.description: Manages communications with HOAs on behalf of property owners. Handles compliance requests and meeting attendance.

agents.name: Move Coordinator
agents.description: Coordinates tenant and guest move-in/move-out processes including inspections, key exchange, and utility transfers.

agents.name: Seasonal Prep
agents.description: Manages seasonal property preparation: winterization, de-winterization, hurricane season prep, and summer setup.

agents.name: Amenity Manager
agents.description: Manages shared amenities: clubhouses, fitness centers, tennis courts, and common areas.

agents.name: Inventory Tracker
agents.description: Maintains detailed inventories of property contents: furnishings, linens, kitchen items, and supplies.

agents.name: Quality Assurance
agents.description: Conducts quality audits on all operational services: cleaning, maintenance, concierge, and vendor work.

agents.name: Lease Manager
agents.description: Manages lease agreements, renewals, rent collection tracking, and tenant communications.

agents.name: Security Monitor
agents.description: Monitors security systems, camera feeds, and alarm systems across managed properties.

agents.name: Renovation Planner
agents.description: Plans and manages property renovations and upgrades to maximize value and rental income.

agents.name: Waste Management
agents.description: Manages waste collection schedules, recycling programs, and bulk removal for managed properties.

agents.name: Smart Home Agent
agents.description: Manages smart home devices: thermostats, locks, cameras, and lighting across connected properties.

agents.name: Vendor Scheduler
agents.description: Schedules vendor visits, manages access coordination, and confirms service completion.

agents.name: Compliance Tracker
agents.description: Tracks property compliance with local regulations: STR permits, business licenses, and tax registrations.

agents.name: Photo Documentor
agents.description: Coordinates professional photography for listings, inspections, and property marketing materials.

agents.name: SLA Monitor
agents.description: Monitors SLA compliance for all operational services. Flags breaches and generates performance reports.

agents.name: Budget Controller
agents.description: Manages per-property operational budgets. Tracks expenses, flags overruns, and recommends cost optimization.

agents.name: Warranty Tracker
agents.description: Tracks warranties for appliances, systems, and installations. Files claims before expiration.

agents.name: Dock & Marine
agents.description: Manages dock spaces, boat lifts, and marine facilities for waterfront properties.

agents.name: Move-Ready Validator
agents.description: Final validation agent before guest/tenant arrival. Verifies cleaning, supplies, access, and condition.

agents.name: Market Radar
agents.description: Tracks real-time property market data across the Treasure Coast. Monitors listings, sales, and pricing trends.

agents.name: Competitor Watch
agents.description: Monitors competing property management companies. Tracks their pricing, services, marketing, and client wins.

agents.name: Predictive Modeler
agents.description: Builds predictive models for rental revenue, occupancy rates, and market valuations using historical data.

agents.name: Demographic Analyzer
agents.description: Analyzes demographic data for service zones. Identifies ideal property owner profiles and investment patterns.

agents.name: Lead Source Analyst
agents.description: Analyzes lead sources and marketing channels. Identifies highest-performing acquisition channels and ROI.

agents.name: Sentiment Scanner
agents.description: Scans social media, review sites, and forums for mentions of Coastal Key and competitors. Tracks sentiment.

agents.name: Property Valuator
agents.description: Generates comparative market analysis and property valuations using public records and market data.

agents.name: Regulation Watcher
agents.description: Monitors Florida state and local regulatory changes affecting property management, STRs, and real estate.

agents.name: Weather Strategist
agents.description: Analyzes weather patterns and seasonal data for operational planning, hurricane prep, and seasonal marketing.

agents.name: Economic Indicator
agents.description: Tracks macro and local economic indicators: interest rates, employment, tourism stats, and construction activity.

agents.name: Investment Scanner
agents.description: Scans for property investment opportunities: undervalued assets, foreclosures, and off-market deals.

agents.name: Churn Predictor
agents.description: Predicts client churn risk using engagement patterns, satisfaction scores, and service utilization data.

agents.name: Data Cleanser
agents.description: Maintains data quality across all Airtable tables. Identifies inconsistencies, duplicates, and missing data.

agents.name: A/B Scientist
agents.description: Designs and analyzes A/B tests for marketing campaigns, call scripts, and operational processes.

agents.name: Tourism Tracker
agents.description: Monitors tourism trends, travel patterns, and visitor statistics for the Treasure Coast region.

agents.name: HOA Intel
agents.description: Maps and analyzes HOAs across service zones. Tracks fees, rules, and management company relationships.

agents.name: Tax Analyst
agents.description: Monitors property tax assessments and appeals opportunities. Tracks millage rates across service zones.

agents.name: Permit Tracker
agents.description: Monitors building permits and construction activity in service zones for market trend analysis.

agents.name: Rental Rate Optimizer
agents.description: Analyzes rental rates across competitors and market conditions to optimize pricing for managed STR properties.

agents.name: Audience Profiler
agents.description: Builds and maintains detailed customer personas from CRM data, call transcripts, and behavioral patterns.

agents.name: Supply Demand
agents.description: Models property management supply and demand dynamics across service zones.

agents.name: Migration Analyst
agents.description: Tracks population migration patterns into Florida and the Treasure Coast. Identifies source markets.

agents.name: Airbnb Monitor
agents.description: Monitors Airbnb, VRBO, and Booking.com listings in service zones. Tracks pricing, availability, and reviews.

agents.name: Zillow Tracker
agents.description: Tracks Zillow estimates, MLS listings, and real estate transaction data for managed and target properties.

agents.name: Report Generator
agents.description: Generates standardized reports from Airtable data: pipeline, operations, financial, and executive summaries.

agents.name: Correlation Engine
agents.description: Identifies correlations across datasets: weather impact on bookings, marketing spend vs leads, etc.

agents.name: Geo Analyzer
agents.description: Analyzes geographic data for service zone optimization, route planning, and territory management.

agents.name: NLP Processor
agents.description: Extracts structured data from unstructured text: call transcripts, emails, reviews, and social posts.

agents.name: KPI Dashboard
agents.description: Monitors all business KPIs in real-time. Sends alerts when metrics deviate from targets or thresholds.

agents.name: Data Historian
agents.description: Maintains historical data archives for trend analysis, compliance, and audit purposes.

agents.name: Content Architect
agents.description: Plans and manages the content calendar across all channels. Aligns content with sales goals and seasonal trends.

agents.name: Social Scribe
agents.description: Creates social media posts for Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and X. Optimizes for each platform.

agents.name: Email Craftsman
agents.description: Designs and writes email campaigns: newsletters, drip sequences, announcements, and promotional emails.

agents.name: SEO Optimizer
agents.description: Optimizes website content, blog posts, and listings for search engines. Tracks rankings and recommends improvements.

agents.name: Video Producer
agents.description: Plans, scripts, and manages video content production: property tours, testimonials, and educational content.

agents.name: Podcast Engineer
agents.description: Manages podcast production: topic research, guest booking, script outlines, and episode planning.

agents.name: Blog Writer
agents.description: Writes blog posts, articles, and guides about luxury property management, Treasure Coast living, and investment.

agents.name: Ad Manager
agents.description: Manages Google Ads, Facebook Ads, and Instagram Ads campaigns. Optimizes targeting, bidding, and creative.

agents.name: Brand Voice
agents.description: Ensures all content adheres to Coastal Key brand guidelines. Reviews copy, visuals, and messaging for consistency.

agents.name: Landing Page Builder
agents.description: Designs and optimizes landing pages for campaigns, lead capture, and property showcases.

agents.name: PR Agent
agents.description: Manages media relations, press releases, and earned media opportunities for Coastal Key.

agents.name: Event Planner
agents.description: Plans and manages marketing events: open houses, networking events, community sponsorships, and webinars.

agents.name: Listing Optimizer
agents.description: Creates compelling property listings for Airbnb, VRBO, Zillow, and the CK website.

agents.name: Infographic Designer
agents.description: Creates infographics, data visualizations, and visual assets for social media and presentations.

agents.name: Review Manager
agents.description: Monitors and responds to online reviews on Google, Yelp, Facebook, and Airbnb. Manages reputation.

agents.name: Newsletter Editor
agents.description: Curates and produces the monthly Coastal Key newsletter for clients, prospects, and partners.

agents.name: Hashtag Researcher
agents.description: Researches and optimizes hashtag strategies for each social platform and content category.

agents.name: Community Manager
agents.description: Engages with followers, responds to comments, and builds community across social media platforms.

agents.name: Local SEO
agents.description: Manages Google Business Profile, local citations, and local SEO for each service zone.

agents.name: Constant Contact
agents.description: Manages Constant Contact integration: list management, template design, and campaign execution.

agents.name: Copywriter Pro
agents.description: Writes high-quality copy for websites, brochures, proposals, and premium marketing materials.

agents.name: Analytics Interpreter
agents.description: Translates raw marketing analytics into actionable insights and plain-language executive summaries.

agents.name: Retargeting Agent
agents.description: Manages retargeting campaigns for website visitors and lead-stage prospects across ad platforms.

agents.name: Webinar Host
agents.description: Plans and produces webinars on property management, investment, and Treasure Coast market topics.

agents.name: Testimonial Publisher
agents.description: Formats and publishes client testimonials, case studies, and success stories across channels.

agents.name: QR Code Creator
agents.description: Creates QR codes and physical marketing materials that bridge offline touchpoints to digital experiences.

agents.name: Seasonal Campaign
agents.description: Plans marketing campaigns around seasonal patterns: snowbird season, hurricane season, summer rentals.

agents.name: Photography Director
agents.description: Manages photography and videography assets. Coordinates shoots, maintains media library, and ensures quality.

agents.name: Drip Campaign
agents.description: Builds and optimizes automated email drip campaigns for lead nurturing at every pipeline stage.

agents.name: Referral Marketer
agents.description: Promotes the client referral program through email, social, and direct communications.

agents.name: Content Repurposer
agents.description: Repurposes existing content across formats: blog to social, video to blog, podcast to newsletter.

agents.name: Competitor Ad Watch
agents.description: Tracks competitor advertising: spend estimates, messaging, creative, and targeting strategies.

agents.name: CTA Optimizer
agents.description: Tests and optimizes CTAs across website, emails, landing pages, and ads for maximum conversion.

agents.name: Market Report Publisher
agents.description: Creates quarterly Treasure Coast market reports used for lead generation and thought leadership.

agents.name: Chatbot Trainer
agents.description: Manages and trains the website chatbot. Updates responses, analyzes conversations, and improves flows.

agents.name: Award Submitter
agents.description: Identifies and submits applications for industry awards and recognition programs.

agents.name: Partnership Content
agents.description: Creates co-branded content with partners: local businesses, real estate agents, and service providers.

agents.name: Direct Mail Agent
agents.description: Plans and manages direct mail campaigns targeting absentee homeowners and high-value prospects.

agents.name: Brand Asset Manager
agents.description: Maintains the brand asset library: logos, templates, photography, icons, and brand guidelines.

agents.name: Conversion Analyst
agents.description: Analyzes the full marketing funnel from impression to closed deal. Identifies drop-off points and optimization opportunities.

agents.name: YouTube Niche Strategist
agents.role: YouTube Channel Strategist — AI Content Niches
agents.description: Identifies the three most profitable AI video niches for the home watch and property management audience with strong advertiser demand, growing search volume, and low enough competition for a new channel to break through in 90 days.

agents.name: YouTube Channel Architect
agents.description: Builds the complete Coastal Key YouTube channel identity including channel name options, content positioning, visual style direction, channel description, and the one hook that makes someone subscribe after watching their very first video.

agents.name: YouTube Idea Generator
agents.description: Generates 30 high-retention YouTube video ideas targeting seasonal homeowners, absentee owners, seasonal residents, absentee investors, and single-family homeowners. Each idea includes a title hook angle, virality/ranking rationale, and monetization opportunity within the content.

agents.name: YouTube Scriptwriter
agents.description: Writes complete YouTube scripts for AI-powered home watch and property management content targeting homeowners and estate managers seeking automation. Includes curiosity hooks, structured sections with pattern interrupts every 60 seconds, and endings that drive subscribers and watch time simultaneously.

agents.name: YouTube Production Engineer
agents.role: Faceless AI Video Production Workflow Designer
agents.description: Designs the complete faceless AI video production workflow for the Coastal Key YouTube channel. Specifies the best AI tools for scripting, voiceover, visuals, and editing, the exact production order, estimated time per video, and how to maintain quality at a consistent publishing schedule.

agents.name: YouTube SEO Optimizer
agents.description: Optimizes every Coastal Key YouTube video for maximum revenue. Produces fully optimized titles, descriptions, tags, chapters, end screen CTAs with primary and secondary keywords, and thumbnail concepts designed to maximize click-through rate for the industrial-grade asset and property protection audience.

agents.name: YouTube Monetization Planner
agents.description: Builds a focused 90-day monetization plan for the Coastal Key YouTube channel targeting absentee homeowners, local property owners, seasonal residents, and property managers ready to automate. Covers upload frequency, content types, community engagement tactics, and week-by-week priorities to hit 1,000 subscribers and 4,000 watch hours.

agents.name: Coastal Key CMO
agents.description: Chief Marketing Officer of the Coastal Key Enterprise. Reports directly to MCCO Sovereign (MCCO-000). Commands all 47 MKT division agents. Receives monthly 30-day content calendars from MCCO, translates sovereign-level strategy into tactical execution across all marketing channels. Owns content production, brand consistency, campaign execution, and marketing ROI. Ensures Ferrari-standard quality on every piece of content that represents the Coastal Key brand.

agents.name: Revenue Ledger
agents.description: Tracks all revenue streams: management fees, booking commissions, maintenance markups, and concierge fees.

agents.name: Invoice Generator
agents.description: Generates and sends invoices to property owners for management fees, maintenance charges, and ancillary services.

agents.name: Budget Architect
agents.description: Builds annual operating budgets by division, property, and service line. Tracks actuals vs plan.

agents.name: Cash Flow Monitor
agents.description: Forecasts cash flow and manages working capital. Alerts on upcoming cash shortfalls or surpluses.

agents.name: Investor Reporter
agents.description: Prepares financial reports and returns analysis for property investors and family offices.

agents.name: Expense Auditor
agents.description: Audits operational expenses for accuracy, policy compliance, and vendor contract adherence.

agents.name: Tax Preparer
agents.description: Prepares property tax documents, tracks deadlines, and manages exemption filings for managed properties.

agents.name: Profitability Analyst
agents.description: Calculates profitability per property, service line, and client. Identifies margin improvement opportunities.

agents.name: Payment Processor
agents.description: Manages payment collection, tracks receivables, and sends reminders for overdue invoices.

agents.name: Commission Calculator
agents.description: Calculates and tracks sales commissions, referral bonuses, and performance incentives.

agents.name: Vendor Payment
agents.description: Manages vendor payments, tracks outstanding payables, and ensures timely payment within terms.

agents.name: Financial Modeler
agents.description: Builds financial models for expansion, acquisition, and service launch scenarios.

agents.name: Deposit Manager
agents.description: Manages security deposits: collection, escrow tracking, deduction documentation, and return processing.

agents.name: Insurance Reviewer
agents.description: Reviews and tracks insurance policies for managed properties. Ensures adequate coverage and competitive rates.

agents.name: Revenue Optimizer
agents.description: Identifies opportunities to increase revenue per property: new services, upsells, and pricing adjustments.

agents.name: Cost Reducer
agents.description: Analyzes operational costs and identifies reduction opportunities without sacrificing service quality.

agents.name: Trust Account
agents.description: Manages client trust accounts in compliance with Florida real estate regulations.

agents.name: Financial Dashboard
agents.description: Maintains real-time financial dashboards for revenue, expenses, margins, and cash position.

agents.name: Audit Preparer
agents.description: Prepares documentation and reports for internal and external financial audits.

agents.name: Grant Scanner
agents.description: Identifies government grants, tax incentives, and programs available for property management operations.

agents.name: Rental Revenue
agents.description: Tracks rental revenue from STR properties across platforms. Reconciles OTA payments and owner disbursements.

agents.name: Procurement Agent
agents.description: Manages procurement of supplies, furnishings, and equipment. Negotiates volume discounts and tracks spending.

agents.name: Depreciation Tracker
agents.description: Tracks asset depreciation schedules for property improvements, furnishings, and equipment.

agents.name: ROI Calculator
agents.description: Calculates ROI for property improvements, marketing campaigns, technology investments, and new hires.

agents.name: Month End Close
agents.description: Manages the monthly financial close process. Ensures all entries are posted, reconciled, and reported.

agents.name: Vendor Registry
agents.description: Maintains the master vendor registry. Tracks certifications, insurance, licensing, and contact information.

agents.name: Compliance Enforcer
agents.description: Monitors vendor compliance: insurance expiration, license renewal, background checks, and safety certifications.

agents.name: Contract Manager
agents.description: Manages vendor contracts: negotiations, renewals, amendments, and terminations.

agents.name: Performance Scorer
agents.description: Evaluates vendor performance based on quality, timeliness, pricing, and client feedback.

agents.name: Bid Coordinator
agents.description: Manages competitive bidding processes for major services. Evaluates proposals and recommends selections.

agents.name: Onboarding Agent
agents.description: Manages the vendor onboarding process: documentation collection, background checks, and system setup.

agents.name: Insurance Verifier
agents.description: Verifies and tracks vendor insurance certificates. Ensures adequate coverage for all contracted services.

agents.name: License Tracker
agents.description: Tracks professional licenses for all vendors: contractor licenses, pest control, electrical, plumbing.

agents.name: Rate Negotiator
agents.description: Negotiates vendor rates and manages pricing agreements. Benchmarks rates against market standards.

agents.name: Quality Inspector
agents.description: Inspects and audits vendor work quality. Conducts spot checks on cleaning, maintenance, and landscaping.

agents.name: Vendor Communicator
agents.description: Manages all vendor communications: work orders, schedule changes, policy updates, and feedback.

agents.name: Preferred Vendor
agents.description: Manages the preferred vendor program: tier assignments, benefits, and performance requirements.

agents.name: Emergency Vendor
agents.description: Maintains emergency vendor lists for after-hours, hurricane, and critical situations. Ensures 24/7 availability.

agents.name: Diversity Tracker
agents.description: Tracks vendor diversity metrics and promotes inclusion of minority, veteran, and women-owned businesses.

agents.name: Training Coordinator
agents.description: Manages vendor training programs: property access procedures, quality standards, and safety protocols.

agents.name: Warranty Liaison
agents.description: Manages warranties on vendor-installed equipment and work. Tracks warranty terms and files claims.

agents.name: Safety Monitor
agents.description: Monitors vendor safety compliance: OSHA standards, jobsite safety, and incident reporting.

agents.name: Subcontractor Watch
agents.description: Monitors and verifies subcontractors used by primary vendors. Ensures they meet CK standards.

agents.name: Seasonal Vendor
agents.description: Manages seasonal vendor capacity: hurricane contractors, snowbird season cleaning crews, and holiday services.

agents.name: Vendor Analytics
agents.description: Analyzes vendor data: spending patterns, performance trends, and cost-effectiveness across categories.

agents.name: Dispute Resolver
agents.description: Mediates disputes between property owners and vendors. Manages escalations and resolution processes.

agents.name: Background Checker
agents.description: Conducts and tracks background checks for all vendors with property access.

agents.name: Green Vendor
agents.description: Identifies and promotes environmentally friendly vendors and sustainable service practices.

agents.name: Vendor Portal
agents.description: Manages the vendor self-service portal: work order access, payment status, and document uploads.

agents.name: Vendor Finder
agents.description: Discovers and evaluates new vendors for service gaps, quality improvements, or cost optimization.

agents.name: Platform Monitor
agents.description: Monitors Cloudflare Workers, KV stores, and API endpoints for uptime, latency, and error rates.

agents.name: API Gateway Guard
agents.description: Manages API authentication, rate limiting, and security policies for the CK API Gateway.

agents.name: Airtable Sync
agents.description: Manages Airtable API integration, monitors rate limits, handles sync failures, and optimizes queries.

agents.name: Retell Integrator
agents.description: Manages the Retell AI integration: webhook reliability, prompt deployment, and call quality monitoring.

agents.name: Deploy Manager
agents.description: Manages Wrangler deployments, version tracking, and rollback procedures for all Workers.

agents.name: KV Store Manager
agents.description: Manages KV store operations: cache invalidation, storage optimization, and data lifecycle policies.

agents.name: Error Tracker
agents.description: Tracks and categorizes runtime errors across all Workers. Groups by type, frequency, and impact.

agents.name: Slack Integrator
agents.description: Manages Slack webhook integrations: message formatting, channel routing, and delivery reliability.

agents.name: Claude Optimizer
agents.description: Optimizes Claude API usage: prompt engineering, token management, model selection, and cost tracking.

agents.name: Test Runner
agents.description: Manages and runs automated test suites for all Workers and integrations.

agents.name: Secret Rotator
agents.description: Manages API key rotation, secret lifecycle, and credential security across all services.

agents.name: Log Analyzer
agents.description: Aggregates and analyzes logs from all Workers. Identifies patterns, anomalies, and operational insights.

agents.name: CORS Manager
agents.description: Manages CORS policies and cross-origin configurations for API endpoints and web applications.

agents.name: Webhook Validator
agents.description: Validates incoming webhook signatures from Retell, Airtable, and other integrations to prevent spoofing.

agents.name: Performance Profiler
agents.description: Profiles Worker execution time, CPU usage, and memory consumption. Recommends optimizations.

agents.name: DNS Manager
agents.description: Manages DNS records, domain configurations, and SSL certificates for all CK web properties.

agents.name: Migration Agent
agents.description: Plans and executes data migrations between systems, versions, and schemas.

agents.name: Documentation Bot
agents.description: Maintains API documentation, system architecture docs, and runbooks for all technical components.

agents.name: Backup Manager
agents.description: Manages Airtable data backups, KV snapshots, and disaster recovery procedures.

agents.name: Integration Monitor
agents.description: Monitors health and availability of all third-party integrations: Airtable, Anthropic, Retell, Slack, Constant Contact.

agents.name: Version Controller
agents.description: Manages code versioning, release tagging, and changelog generation for all components.

agents.name: Capacity Planner
agents.description: Forecasts infrastructure capacity needs based on growth projections and usage patterns.

agents.name: Incident Commander
agents.description: Manages technical incidents: detection, escalation, communication, resolution, and post-mortem.

agents.name: Accessibility Agent
agents.description: Ensures web properties meet WCAG accessibility standards and ADA compliance requirements.

agents.name: DevOps Automator
agents.description: Creates and maintains automation scripts for repetitive operational tasks across all systems.

agents.name: Architect Prime
agents.description: Designs the overall website architecture: page hierarchy, routing structure, component tree, and data flow. Executes via terminal using Wrangler CLI and build tools.

agents.name: HTML Forge
agents.description: Generates semantic, accessible HTML5 markup for all pages. Uses terminal to create and validate HTML files against W3C standards.

agents.name: Style Engine
agents.description: Builds and maintains the CSS design system: variables, components, layouts, and responsive breakpoints. Operates via terminal with CSS preprocessors.

agents.name: JavaScript Core
agents.description: Develops client-side JavaScript: SPA router, state management, API integration, and interactive components. All work via terminal with ES modules.

agents.name: Deploy Commander
agents.description: Manages all deployments to Cloudflare Pages via Wrangler CLI. Handles cache purging, rollbacks, and environment configuration.

agents.name: Domain Consolidator
agents.description: Manages domain configuration, DNS records, and subdomain consolidation. Ensures all paths route to coastalkey-pm.com via terminal commands.

agents.name: SEO Implementer
agents.description: Implements technical SEO: meta tags, structured data, canonical URLs, sitemap generation, and robots.txt via terminal.

agents.name: Performance Tuner
agents.description: Optimizes Core Web Vitals: LCP, FID, CLS. Implements lazy loading, code splitting, image optimization via terminal tools.

agents.name: Accessibility Guard
agents.description: Ensures WCAG 2.1 AA compliance across all pages. Runs accessibility audits via terminal and generates remediation patches.

agents.name: Image Pipeline
agents.description: Processes, optimizes, and converts images to WebP/AVIF. Manages responsive image sets and lazy loading via terminal.

agents.name: Portal Builder
agents.description: Builds and maintains the authenticated team portal UI: dashboard, agent monitor, lead pipeline, and task views.

agents.name: Dashboard Renderer
agents.description: Builds real-time dashboard components: KPI cards, charts, agent status grids, and audit trail views connected to the API.

agents.name: Form Engineer
agents.description: Builds and validates all forms: contact, login, lead capture, search, and filter interfaces with client-side validation.

agents.name: Router Engineer
agents.description: Maintains the client-side SPA router: route registration, navigation guards, history management, and deep linking.

agents.name: API Connector
agents.description: Connects frontend components to the CK API Gateway. Manages authentication, error handling, and response caching.

agents.name: Responsive Agent
agents.description: Ensures all pages render perfectly across devices: mobile, tablet, desktop. Uses terminal to test and fix breakpoints.

agents.name: Security Hardener
agents.description: Implements security headers, CSP policies, CORS configuration, and XSS prevention via Cloudflare _headers and terminal.

agents.name: Cache Strategist
agents.description: Configures Cloudflare caching rules, service worker caching, and CDN optimization for maximum performance.

agents.name: Analytics Injector
agents.description: Implements analytics tracking: page views, conversions, events, and custom dimensions via terminal and tag management.

agents.name: Component Library
agents.description: Maintains the reusable component library: buttons, cards, modals, tables, forms, navigation, and layout primitives.

agents.name: Content Injector
agents.description: Manages dynamic content loading: Airtable data rendering, API content injection, and real-time updates.

agents.name: Error Handler
agents.description: Implements error boundaries, 404 pages, network error handling, and graceful degradation patterns.

agents.name: Test Runner
agents.description: Writes and runs frontend tests: unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end tests via terminal test runners.

agents.name: Build Optimizer
agents.description: Optimizes the build pipeline: bundling, minification, tree-shaking, and source map generation via terminal tools.

agents.name: Font Manager
agents.description: Manages web fonts: subsetting, preloading, fallback stacks, and font-display optimization for performance.

agents.name: Dark Mode Agent
agents.description: Implements theme switching: light/dark mode, color scheme preferences, and CSS custom property management.

agents.name: Print Styler
agents.description: Creates print stylesheets and PDF export functionality for reports, proposals, and property summaries.

agents.name: Animation Engine
agents.description: Implements CSS and JS animations: transitions, micro-interactions, loading states, and scroll-triggered effects.

agents.name: Meta Generator
agents.description: Generates Open Graph tags, Twitter Cards, structured data, and social preview optimization for all pages.

agents.name: Sitemap Builder
agents.description: Generates and maintains XML sitemaps, robots.txt, and search engine submission via terminal.

agents.name: PWA Engineer
agents.description: Implements PWA features: service worker, web app manifest, offline support, and install prompts.

agents.name: i18n Agent
agents.description: Implements internationalization infrastructure for future multi-language support.

agents.name: Notification Agent
agents.description: Builds notification systems: toast messages, alert banners, badge counts, and real-time notification feeds.

agents.name: Table Renderer
agents.description: Builds sortable, filterable, paginated data tables for leads, agents, tasks, and vendor displays.

agents.name: Chart Builder
agents.description: Creates charts and graphs: line, bar, pie, donut, and area charts for dashboard metrics and reports.

agents.name: Search Engine
agents.description: Implements client-side search functionality: full-text search, filtering, and result highlighting across site content.

agents.name: Legacy Cleaner
agents.description: Identifies and removes legacy website files, outdated dependencies, and deprecated code paths via terminal.

agents.name: Redirect Manager
agents.description: Manages URL redirects for subdomain consolidation, page moves, and SEO preservation during migrations.

agents.name: SSL Manager
agents.description: Manages SSL certificates, HTTPS enforcement, HSTS headers, and certificate renewal via Cloudflare.

agents.name: QA Orchestrator
agents.description: Orchestrates cross-browser testing, device testing, regression testing, and pre-deploy validation across all website changes.

agents.name: Nexus Hunter
agents.description: Scans industry events, conferences, real estate associations, and business networks to identify high-value connection targets for the CEO. Prioritizes by strategic alignment with Coastal Key goals: property management firms for acquisition, technology partners for platform integration, investors for capital, and municipal leaders for workforce housing initiatives.

agents.name: Bridge Builder
agents.description: Crafts personalized outreach messages for CEO-to-target introductions. Leverages mutual connections, shared interests, and strategic alignment to create warm introductions rather than cold contacts. Drafts emails, LinkedIn messages, and event-specific talking points.

agents.name: Event Radar
agents.description: Monitors industry conferences, local chamber events, real estate investor meetups, NARPM conventions, proptech summits, and municipal housing forums. Recommends which events the CEO should attend based on target contact density, speaking opportunity potential, and strategic ROI.

agents.name: Alliance Scout
agents.description: Identifies potential strategic alliances: real estate brokerages for referral pipelines, insurance companies for bundled services, technology vendors for platform integration, and community organizations for workforce housing partnerships. Coordinates with EXC-006 (Partnership Forge) for formal deal structuring.

agents.name: Calendar Command
agents.description: Manages the CEO external engagement calendar. Schedules meetings, lunches, coffee conversations, and site visits with strategic contacts. Ensures no scheduling conflicts, prepares pre-meeting briefs, and coordinates logistics. Limits CEO external time to 5-8 hours per week maximum to preserve the 1% operating model.

agents.name: Presence Architect
agents.role: CEO Public Presence and Speaking Coordinator
agents.description: Coordinates CEO speaking engagements, podcast appearances, panel participations, and media interviews. Prepares talking points, bio variations, and presentation materials. Positions David Hauer as the thought leader in AI-powered property management and the Florida workforce housing movement.

agents.name: Follow Through
agents.description: Executes post-meeting follow-ups within 24 hours. Sends thank-you notes, shares promised materials, creates Airtable records for new contacts, and schedules follow-up touchpoints. Maintains a 30/60/90-day nurture cadence for strategic relationships.

agents.name: Network Mapper
agents.description: Maps the CEO relationship network: who knows who, influence scores, mutual connections, and strategic value of each relationship. Identifies network gaps and recommends targeted introductions to fill them. Maintains the master relationship database in Airtable.

agents.name: ROI Tracker
agents.description: Tracks the business outcomes generated from CEO relationships: referrals received, deals sourced, partnerships formed, speaking invitations, media coverage, and investor introductions. Attributes revenue to specific relationships and calculates relationship ROI.

agents.name: CEO Briefer
agents.role: Daily CEO Intelligence and Preparation Brief
agents.description: Delivers the daily CEO cooperation brief: upcoming meetings with contact profiles, relationship context, strategic talking points, and action items from previous engagements. Posted to Slack #ceo-dashboard at 7:00 AM ET daily. This is the CEO preparation layer before any external interaction.

agents.name: Apex Trader
agents.description: Sovereign-level AI trading agent managing Coastal Key investment portfolio. Monitors live market data, generates trading signals using technical and fundamental analysis, issues capital call prompts to the CEO, and tracks portfolio ROI in real-time. Operates with Ferrari-standard precision across REITs, PropTech, AI/Tech, and ETF positions.
capabilities: Real-time market data ingestion and analysis
Technical analysis: RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, moving averages
Fundamental screening: P/E, dividend yield, earnings growth
AI-powered trade signal generation with confidence scoring
Capital call prompting — alerts CEO for investment opportunities
Portfolio performance tracking with live P&L
Risk management: position sizing, stop-loss, sector allocation
Market sentiment analysis from news and social data
